sub_modules.conv2d_coord: Combinational coordinate and window-valid flag generation from stream row and column counters.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_pack: Combinational packing of the 3x3 stencil pixels into a flattened dot-product vector.
sub_modules.conv2d_coeffs: Combinational default 3x3 Gaussian coefficient ROM flattened for the datapath.
sub_modules.conv2d_dot_product: Combinational matrix-vector multiply-accumulate datapath for the stencil window.
sub_modules.conv2d_output_cast: Combinational cast from accumulator width to the output pixel width.
